into_the_wild.name: Arthur's Seat
into_the_wild.description: A prominent volcanic hill and popular hiking destination offering stunning views of Edinburgh and the surrounding landscape. The climb attracts many visitors and provides excellent photo opportunities from the summit.

into_the_wild.name: The Meadows
into_the_wild.description: A large green space in central Edinburgh that is particularly beautiful in foggy conditions and offers a peaceful escape in the heart of the city. Great for walks and enjoying nature within the urban area.

into_the_wild.name: Thistle Foundation in Craigmillar
into_the_wild.description: A scenic location that offers beautiful morning views, particularly in foggy conditions. Located in a quieter part of Edinburgh away from the main tourist areas.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Victoria Street
gram_worthy_spots.description: A charming and picturesque street that inspired the design of Diagon Alley in the Harry Potter films. The colorful architecture and medieval character make it a must-visit photo spot.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Dean Village
gram_worthy_spots.description: A picturesque area featuring medieval architecture and charming buildings nestled below the city center. Perfect for photography enthusiasts interested in historical Edinburgh.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Arthur's Seat Summit
gram_worthy_spots.description: The top of this volcanic hill provides spectacular panoramic views of Edinburgh and surrounding areas, making it an excellent location for memorable photographs.
